label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out which present Bob ends up with after all the swaps. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me list out who has what initially: - Alice: brown - Bob: orange ball - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: white Now, there are several swaps. Let me go step by step through each swap and track what each person has after each exchange. First swap: Bob and Eve swap. So Bob had the orange ball, Eve had the white present. After swapping, Bob gets white and Eve gets orange ball. So after first swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: white - Claire: purple - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange ball Second swap: Bob and Claire swap. Bob has white, Claire has purple. After swapping, Bob gets purple and Claire gets white. After second swap: - Alice: brown - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: yellow - Eve: orange ball Third swap: Dave and Alice swap. Dave has yellow, Alice has brown. After swapping, Dave gets brown and Alice gets yellow. After third swap: - Alice: yellow - Bob: purple - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: orange ball Fourth swap: Bob and Eve swap. Bob has purple, Eve has orange ball. After swapping, Bob gets orange ball and Eve gets purple. After fourth swap: - Alice: yellow - Bob: orange ball - Claire: white - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Fifth swap: Alice and Bob swap. Alice has yellow, Bob has orange ball. After swapping, Alice gets orange ball and Bob gets yellow. After fifth swap: - Alice: orange ball -
